description: Canonical Violyra production phase definitions. Consumed by writing-video-plan, executing-video-plan, and docs/usage.md. Resolve both {project_dir} and {chapter_dir} when instantiating production-plan.json.

phases.title: Set up project workspace
verification: SPEC.md exists and documents the project defaults in Markdown
assets/, docs/, and logs/ directories exist

phases.title: Localize and preprocess declared source assets
verification: All source assets required for this project mode are present or explicitly deferred
phases.note: Template phase only. writing-video-plan must rewrite this phase from video-idea.md based on the project's declared source assets and preprocessing needs.

phases.title: Run production pipeline for the primary chapter
verification: {chapter_dir} exists
chapter.json, shot-list.json, extraction-report.json, shot-details.json, and consistency-report.json exist under {chapter_dir}
global/ or characters/ contains at least one pack file
phases.note: Default happy path uses {project_dir}/chapters/chapter-01 as the primary chapter directory.

phases.title: Review lyric-to-scene mapping if counts diverge
verification: lyric-scene-reconciliation.md documents either no mismatch or the explicit reconciliation decision
phases.note: Enable only when aligned lyric segments and planned scene count do not match cleanly.

phases.title: Generate reference images and optional start frames
verification: reference-images/ contains at least one image per recurring character when enabled
start-frames/ contains any shot-specific starting frames needed for image-to-video generation
phases.note: Enable when a named character appears in 3 or more scenes or when the design doc explicitly calls for reference images/start frames.

phases.title: Write chapter-local video generation prompts
verification: video-prompts.json exists under {chapter_dir}
prompt count matches shot count in shot-details.json

phases.title: Generate first-pass scene clips
verification: scenes/ exists under {chapter_dir}
scene-generation.manifest.json exists under {chapter_dir}
clip count matches prompt count in video-prompts.json

phases.title: Compile the first full draft
verification: final/draft.mp4 exists and is non-zero
draft.mp4 duration is within 10% of song.mp3 duration

phases.title: Retention-driven development pass
verification: retention-report.json exists under {chapter_dir}
weak shots are regenerated or explicitly accepted

phases.title: Recompile after retention pass
verification: final/final.mp4 exists and is non-zero
final/final.mp4 is newer than final/draft.mp4

phases.title: Request final video review
verification: review-feedback.md exists
review-feedback.md contains Status: pass or Status: fail

phases.title: Generate thumbnail candidates and select the winner
verification: final/thumbnail.jpg exists and is non-zero
thumbnail dimensions are at least 1280x720

phases.title: Deliver approved assets to the publishing platform
verification: review-feedback.md shows Status: pass
final/final.mp4 and final/thumbnail.jpg are ready for upload
phases.note: No Violyra upload skill exists yet. Treat this as a manual final step.
